external_references.source_name: Black Hills Information Security TruffleHog January 2024
external_references.description: Chris Traynor. (2024, January 18). Rooting For Secrets with TruffleHog. Retrieved April 15, 2026.
Gianpietro Cutolo. (2025, November 26). Shai-Hulud 2.0: Aggressive, Automated, and Fast Spreading. Retrieved April 9, 2026.
Trufflesecurity. (2026, April 8). TruffleHog Enterprise. Retrieved April 15, 2026.

objects.description: [TruffleHog](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S9009) can obtain secrets from AWS Secrets and GCP Secret Manager.(Citation: Black Hills Information Security TruffleHog January 2024)(Citation: Github TruffleSecurity Trufflehog April 2025) [TruffleHog](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S9009) has also gathered passwords, secrets and API keys from source repositories, .env files, and git history.(Citation: Netskope Shai-Hulud November 2025)
